title: Premium Wild Bird Food – Sunflower Hearts for Garden Birds – High Energy, No Mess Bird Feed (5L Bag, Sunflower Hearts)
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: 🐦 Premium Quality & Nutrition – Made with the finest seeds, nuts, and mealworms, our carefully selected ingredients provide high-energy food for garden birds throughout the year. Perfect for breeding season, winter survival, and everyday feeding.
🌿 Freshness-Sealed for Maximum Taste – Each 5L Bag of wild bird seed is air-sealed to preserve freshness, flavor, and nutrients, ensuring your birds get the best with every peck.
📦 Generous 5L Size for Less Hassle – A bulk bird seed Tub means fewer refills and more time enjoying nature. Ideal for use in bird feeders, bird tables, and ground-feeding stations.

🌎 A Variety of Blends for Every Bird Species – Whether your feathered visitors prefer sunflower hearts, peanuts, dried mealworms, or a no-mess seed mix, we have the perfect wild bird food selection to attract a diverse range of birds.
